name: mcp-health-monitor
description: Monitor your MCP servers: health checks, uptime, response times, and Azure DevOps pipeline status

HEALTH_MONITOR_DB.description: Custom path for the SQLite database (optional)

HEALTH_MONITOR_AUTO_CHECK.description: Set to '1' to enable background scheduled checks

HEALTH_MONITOR_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Key material used to encrypt Azure DevOps PAT tokens

HEALTH_MONITOR_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Number of days to retain health check history

HEALTH_MONITOR_MAX_CONCURRENCY.description: Maximum number of concurrent scheduled checks
